torch_pattern: dense_routing = torch.zeros_like(router_probs).scatter(dim, top_k_indices, top_k_values)  # gpt_oss dense-routing pattern observed at call site; generic form: out = input.scatter({DIM}, index, src)

config_template.layout: ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT if input.dtype == float32 else TILE_LAYOUT

weight_transform: none (index tensor cast to int32; index/src/input converted to ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT when dtype is float32, otherwise TILE_LAYOUT)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, H, S, D] attention context, float32
placement_observations.source: call_site: sparse-attention context scatter — float32 path converts base/src/index via ttnn.to_layout(..., ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT) before ttnn.scatter(dim=2), then back to TILE_LAYOUT

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, H, S, D] attention context, bfloat16
placement_observations.source: call_site: sparse-attention context scatter — non-float32 path keeps TILE_LAYOUT, scatter_idx converted to TILE_LAYOUT before ttnn.scatter(dim=2)
call_site: ttnn.from_torch(mask_indices, dtype=ttnn.int32, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT) feeding ttnn.scatter(input_embeds, 0, mask_indices_tt, image_embeds)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, token_count, group_count] repeated src for expert-group mask
placement_observations.source: call_site: MoE expert-group masking — src repeated via ttnn.repeat then ttnn.scatter; output converted to TILE_LAYOUT only after scatter (active_groups_mask = ttnn.to_layout(..., TILE_LAYOUT))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, S, E] dense router probabilities (zeros_like base)
placement_observations.source: call_site: MoE TopK router — ttnn.scatter(ttnn.zeros_like(router_probs), dim=-1, index=top_k_indices, src=top_k_values) fully on device; inputs deallocated immediately after
